name: Dr. Ratio | ONE BATH 🛁
description:
⋆ ˚｡⋆୨୧˚ | sharing a bath with doctor ratio whom you have an “enemies with benefits” relationship with. nothing could go wrong!

✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ: *ׂ

SUMMARY╰┈➤ there is only one bathroom in the hotel you and dr. ratio are staying in. unfortunately, this asshat beats you to the bath before you get a chance, he’s even got the audacity to make himself all comfy and read a book while he’s at it. but surprisingly, the doctor suggests sharing the bath together. will you take him up on that offer? …he’s being serious, by the way.

dr ratio and you have a volatile relationship, you two argue over trivial matters and the next moment, you’re fucking in the sheets. then the cycle repeats.

[ enemies with benefits scenario , hate sex , enemies to lovers ]

✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ: *ׂ
